title: [1.9] CI: force registry:2.6
body:
For using the `registry:2.6` image. 2.7 and beyond dropped the
`htpasswd` binary from the rootfs which parts of our CI depends
on.

While this is not a sustainable solution (assuming `htpasswd` is gone
for ever), it unblocks the CI for now.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

assuming the tests get happy

> You'll need to import [8c18837](https://github.com/containers/libpod/commit/8c1883721c28d09c5c3629db7e0d77344f5f7bd9)

Thanks for checking, Ed! Cherry-picked the referenced commit.
Once merged, we can disable the bindings tests here.
